title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. tatrae
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. tatrae, also known as Hieracium tatrae, is a subspecies of the Hieracium bupleuroides plant, a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Hieracium tatrae can be found in infusions, teas, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
